text.title: Earned Value Management Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the earned-value-management methodology converts inputs into a valid `report` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: inputs_ready=true → ev_method_locked=true → SPI=0.85 < 0.9 → corrective action plan triggered.
